title: taraxacum frondatum
intro: Taraxacum frondatum, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the same genus as the common dandelion (Taraxacum officinale). The leaves and roots of this plant have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues due to their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum frondatum include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as supporting the immune system and reducing the risk of certain diseases. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions made from the leaves and roots, which can be used to extract its medicinal properties and provide its health benefits.
